V-M-037.checks: Admin frontend must become compact and usable from a phone for operational status, user search, devices, payments/analytics, and system health.
V-M-037.test-files: frontend-admin/src/components/Layout.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Users.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Devices.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Analytics.tsx frontend-admin/src/components/StatCard.tsx frontend-admin/src/index.css frontend-admin/src/lib/api.ts frontend-admin/src/types/index.ts
V-M-037.commands: cd frontend-admin && npm run build; Phase-24 Chrome/CDP mobile admin smoke for /, /users, /devices, and /analytics at 360x740, 390x844, and 430x932; static review confirms device action buttons open confirmation state before mutation; git diff --name-only -- deploy install.sh nginx docker-compose.yml frontend-admin/Dockerfile frontend-admin/nginx.conf is empty

levels.module-local: TypeScript/Vite build and static source review after every Phase-24 frontend-admin change.
levels.wave-level: Mobile smoke across overview, users, devices, and analytics/payment routes after each completed UI wave.
levels.phase-level: Final Phase-24 gate requires build, mobile smoke, confirmation-path evidence, and deploy/install no-diff evidence before V-M-037 can move to pass-local.

module-checks.check-2: Mobile overview surfaces service health, users, subscriptions, revenue, VPN/system status, and urgent counts without desktop-only layout.
module-checks.check-3: User search and device registry are readable on phone viewports without table-only primary workflows.
module-checks.check-4: Device block, unblock, rotate, and revoke are reachable and require confirmation.
module-checks.check-5: Audit-sensitive admin actions preserve current backend audit expectations and show refreshed success/error feedback.
module-checks.check-6: No deploy/install scripts are modified during Phase-24 execution.
module-checks.check-7: Admin API base path and device endpoint names remain compatible with M-006 and M-024 unless separately approved.
module-checks.check-8: Mobile smoke auth fixture uses a test admin state and does not require storing real production tokens in evidence.

deterministic-assertions.assert-1: cd frontend-admin && npm run build exits 0.
deterministic-assertions.assert-2: Every checked viewport records document.documentElement.scrollWidth <= window.innerWidth.
deterministic-assertions.assert-3: Device action controls do not call blockMutation.mutate, unblockMutation.mutate, rotateMutation.mutate, or revokeMutation.mutate directly from row buttons.
deterministic-assertions.assert-4: Routes /, /users, /devices, and /analytics remain registered in frontend-admin/src/main.tsx and reachable from the compact navigation.
deterministic-assertions.assert-5: deploy, install.sh, nginx, docker-compose.yml, frontend-admin/Dockerfile, and frontend-admin/nginx.conf have no Phase-24 diff.

static-probes.probe-1: Review frontend-admin/src/pages/Devices.tsx for confirmation state, dialog/sheet/modal, or equivalent explicit confirmation before mutation.
static-probes.probe-2: Review frontend-admin/src/components/Layout.tsx for mobile navigation that does not preserve the 320px sidebar as the primary phone path.
static-probes.probe-3: Review frontend-admin/src/pages/Users.tsx and frontend-admin/src/pages/Devices.tsx for compact rows/cards that are usable without table-only horizontal scrolling.
static-probes.probe-4: Review frontend-admin/src/pages/Analytics.tsx for phone-first KPI summaries before chart-heavy detail.

viewport-matrix.viewport-1: Overview loads without horizontal document scroll and exposes system health plus urgent user/device navigation.
viewport-matrix.viewport-2: Search, counters, role/status, identity, and pagination fit without a desktop-only table dependency.
viewport-matrix.viewport-3: Device rows, signals, and block/unblock/rotate/revoke confirmation paths fit within the viewport.
viewport-matrix.viewport-4: Payment and analytics status remains readable without charts dominating the first phone viewport.

smoke-fixture.auth-fixture: Use a non-production persisted admin-auth/localStorage fixture or a test backend session; never record real admin_token or refresh token values.
smoke-fixture.api-fixture: Use local backend, mocked network responses, or existing dev fixtures sufficient to render stats, users, devices, billing, and health states.
smoke-fixture.state-fixture: Exercise loading, empty, populated, success feedback, error feedback, and confirmation states where practical.

scenarios.scenario-1: Admin can inspect system state and manage a device from a phone without switching to desktop layout.
scenarios.scenario-2: Admin can search a user and read role/status/account context from compact rows at 360px width.
scenarios.scenario-3: Admin can open a device action confirmation that names the target peer before mutation.
scenarios.scenario-4: Critical device actions are hidden in a wide table or unavailable on mobile.
scenarios.scenario-5: An admin action lacks confirmation or loses audit visibility.
scenarios.scenario-6: A compact UI change modifies deploy/install scripts, backend business rules, or billing provider behavior.

telemetry.telemetry-1: Record route, viewport width/height, scrollWidth, innerWidth, and primary visible controls for each smoke step.
telemetry.telemetry-2: Record the device action name, target display label, confirmation surface presence, and post-action feedback behavior without storing peer keys or tokens.
telemetry.telemetry-3: Record build command, exit code, and git diff no-deploy result.

redaction.redact-1: Do not record admin_token, admin_refresh_token, Authorization headers, cookies, private keys, full VPN configs, raw .env values, payment secrets, or database URLs.
redaction.redact-2: Use anonymized emails and device names in screenshots or textual evidence when possible.

V-M-037.autonomous-execution-safety: Autonomous execution is allowed only for frontend-admin UI files and matching MyGRACE docs. Backend business rules, billing provider behavior, Phase-25 auth/session changes, deploy scripts, install scripts, docker, and nginx files are excluded.

planned-evidence.evidence-1: Record npm build result after source changes.
planned-evidence.evidence-2: Record Chrome/CDP or equivalent viewport smoke for /, /users, /devices, and /analytics.
planned-evidence.evidence-3: Record static review that block, unblock, rotate, and revoke cannot execute without confirmation.
planned-evidence.evidence-4: Record git diff check for deploy, install.sh, docker, and nginx surfaces.
planned-evidence.evidence-5: Record M-006/M-024 backend contract guard only if frontend execution changes admin API calls or backend/admin files.
